2024-25 Florida Atlantic Owls Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 18-16 (10-8, 5th in AAC MBB)

Coach: John Jakus

PS/G: 78.7 (61st of 364)

PA/G: 75.6 (288th of 364)

SRS: 3.71 (108th of 364)

SOS: 1.96 (104th of 364)

ORtg: 111.6 (84th of 364)

DRtg: 107.1 (248th of 364)

Preseason Odds: Championship +50000
